story-context.title: JWT Claims Schema and Time-Based Validation (Layers 3-5)
story-context.summary: Implement JWT Algorithm validation (RS256 only), Claims schema validation (required claims), and Time-based validation (exp/iat/nbf with 30s clock skew).
story-context.key-code: - Layer 3: RS256 algorithm enforcement (hardcoded, reject HS256) - Layer 4: Required claims: sub, iss, aud, exp, iat, tenant_id, roles - Layer 5: Time-based validation with 30s clock skew tolerance - Configuration: eaf.security.jwt.clock-skew=30s
story-context.critical-claims: - sub (user ID) - tenant_id (for Epic 4 multi-tenancy) - roles (for Epic 3 RBAC) - exp/iat/nbf (prevent expired/future tokens)
story-context.testing: Unit tests for each validation layer, Integration test with intentionally invalid tokens (missing claims, expired)
